description: Add Admin Dashboard page with overview of all manageable content, quick links to management pages, and session timeout handling. Also add an admin navigation sidebar/menu that provides easy access to all admin functions.
steps: Create grape/src/pages/Admin/Dashboard.jsx - a protected admin dashboard page using BaseLayout. Include: (1) Welcome section showing logged-in user email, (2) Quick stats cards showing counts of products, track records, board posts (fetch from existing API functions in src/lib/api.js), (3) Quick link cards to all admin/management pages: Product Management (/products/safety), Track Record Management (/cases/smart-safety), Announcements (/customer-service/announcement), OG Settings (/admin/og-settings), Change Password (/admin/change-password), (4) Recent activity section (latest 5 board posts).

Create grape/src/pages/Admin/Dashboard.css - style the dashboard with a card-based grid layout. Use responsive design (2-3 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile). Follow the project's CSS variable patterns (--spacing-md, --spacing-2xl, etc.).

Create grape/src/components/AdminLayout/index.jsx - a wrapper layout for admin pages that includes a side navigation with links to: Dashboard (/admin/dashboard), OG Settings (/admin/og-settings), Change Password (/admin/change-password), Products (/products/safety), Announcements (/customer-service/announcement), Cases (/cases/smart-safety). Highlight the current active link based on location.
Create grape/src/components/AdminLayout/AdminLayout.css - style the admin sidebar (fixed left panel on desktop, collapsible on mobile).

Update grape/src/contexts/AuthContext.jsx to add session timeout handling: check token expiry every 60 seconds, show a warning notification 5 minutes before expiry, and automatically sign out when expired. Add a sessionExpiringSoon state that components can use.
Update grape/src/App.jsx to add route /admin/dashboard wrapped in ProtectedRoute, import Dashboard component.
Update grape/src/components/Menu/index.jsx to add a conditional admin menu item (visible only when isAuthenticated() is true) that links to /admin/dashboard with label '관리자'.
acceptance_criteria: The /admin/dashboard page renders for logged-in users showing welcome message, quick stats, and quick links
AdminLayout component provides side navigation on admin pages
Session timeout handling warns user before token expiry and logs out when expired
The main navigation menu shows '관리자' link when user is logged in
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/thingswell-homepage-model001/grape && npm run build` and confirm it succeeds with exit code 0
